title: The Encounter of Taoism and Fascism in The Man in the High Castle
author: Patricia Warrick
card_summary: A foundational scholarly article from Science Fiction Studies (Vol. 7, No. 2, July 1980) by Patricia Warrick examining the philosophical tension between Taoism and fascism in Dick's The Man in the High Castle. Warrick was one of the earliest and most important academic Dick scholars. 18 pages.
